privileged_info_summary: Task pixelate_effect@1 applies GIMP's pixelate filter to real Unsplash portrait/landscape images. Verification uses 5 criteria: block pattern detection (Sobel edge analysis), minimum block size >= 8 pixels, detail reduction >= 30%, color reduction >= 10%, and pixel change > 3%. Pass threshold is 75% (>= 4/5 criteria). README documents block size, detail reduction, and pass threshold correctly; however, omits color reduction (>=10%) and pixel change (>3%) requirements. Task timeout: 90 seconds, max steps: 8, reward type: sparse. Data sources verified as real Unsplash images (photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d at 3569x5354, fallback photo-1472099645785-5658abf4ff4e at 5760x3840).
